apihelp-query+checkuser-summary: Check which IP addresses are used by a given username or which usernames are used by a given IP address.
apihelp-query+checkuser-summary-api-disa: '''This API has been disabled by the site administrators. Querying the API will return no data.''' {{int:apihelp-query+checkuser-summary}}
apihelp-query+checkuser-paramvalue-reque: Get IP address of target user.
Get actions performed by target IP address or range.
Get users from target IP address or range.
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-target: Username, IP address, or CIDR range to check.
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-timecond: Time limit of user data (like "-2 weeks" or "2 weeks ago").
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-xff: Use XFF data instead of IP address.
apihelp-query+checkuserlog-summary: Get entries from the CheckUser log.
apihelp-query+checkuserlog-param-target: Checked user, IP address, or CIDR range.
apihelp-query+checkuserlog-param-from: The timestamp to start enumerating from.
apihelp-query+checkuserformattedblockinf: Return formatted block details for sitewide blocks affecting the current user.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-summar: Show most recent edits across all wikis for a given registered user.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-param-: Username to look up (must not be an IP).
Continuation offset to resume the enumeration from.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-exampl: Show most recent edits across all wikis for a given user.
Show most recent edits across all wikis for a given user from a given continuation offset, with a custom limit.
apierror-checkuser-missingsummary: You must define reason for check.
apierror-checkuser-timelimit: You need use correct time limit (like "-2 weeks" or "2 weeks ago").
apierror-checkuser-nosuchuser: No such user for this username
apierror-checkuser-disabled: The 'checkuser' query API has been disabled by the site administrators.
checkuser-api-help-paramvalue-direction-: List oldest first. Note: $1from has to be before $1to.
List newest first (default). Note: $1from has to be later than $1to.
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-revi: User $1 is not the author of revision $2
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-mapp: Client hint mappings already exist for $1 $2
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-call: The $1 $2 is too old to allow recording client hints data
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-expl: {{SITENAME}} collects user-agent client hint data to assist in moderating vandalism and abuse. See https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CheckUser/Client_Hints for more details.
apihelp-logout-param-checkuserclienthint: Client hints data supplied alongside requests to ApiLogout. For internal use only.
checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-expiry-invalid: The provided auto-reveal expiry is invalid.
checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-missing-permiss: You do not have the permission needed to use IP auto-reveal.
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-case-u: The provided case ID does not exist
The suggested investigations feature is not enabled
rest-module-checkuser.v0-desc: REST API for CheckUser tools. See [CheckUser extension documentation](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Extension:CheckUser#APIs).
checkuser-rest-request-desc-userinfo: Request body to retrieve information for the UserInfoCard
checkuser-rest-response-desc-userinfo: Response containing detailed public and restricted user activity data
checkuser-rest-property-desc-local-regis: Local registration timestamp of the user
checkuser-rest-property-desc-first-regis: First registration timestamp of the user across all wikis
checkuser-rest-property-desc-blocked-or-: Whether the user is currently indefinitely blocked locally or globally, or locked
checkuser-rest-property-desc-groups: Formatted HTML list of local user groups
checkuser-rest-property-desc-total-edit-: Total local edit count of the user
checkuser-rest-property-desc-global-edit: Total global edit count of the user
checkuser-rest-property-desc-global-grou: Formatted HTML list of global user groups
checkuser-rest-property-desc-global-rest: Timestamp when the global restriction was applied
checkuser-rest-property-desc-active-wiki: Map between wikis where the user has edit activity and corresponding contributions page URLs
checkuser-rest-property-desc-checkuser-c: Number of CheckUser checks performed on this user
checkuser-rest-property-desc-checkuser-l: Timestamp of the most recent CheckUser check performed on this user
checkuser-rest-property-desc-suggested-i: Number of suggested investigation cases associated with this user
checkuser-rest-property-desc-can-access-: Whether the performer can access temporary account IP addresses for the user
checkuser-rest-property-desc-active-bloc: Number of active blocks on the local wiki
checkuser-rest-property-desc-active-loca: Total number of active local blocks across all wikis
checkuser-rest-property-desc-past-blocks: Number of past blocks on the local wiki
checkuser-rest-property-desc-temp-accoun: List of two integers [min, max] representing the range of active temporary account counts on any IP address used by the user
checkuser-rest-property-desc-special-cen: URL to the Special:CentralAuth page for the user
checkuser-rest-param-desc-name: Username for whom to query the block or lock status
checkuser-rest-response-desc-userinfo-bl: Response containing status indicator of user block or lock
checkuser-rest-property-desc-should-show: Whether the user is indefinitely blocked locally or globally, or locked
checkuser-rest-param-desc-limit-ips: Maximum number of IP addresses to return
checkuser-rest-response-desc-temp-accoun: Response containing IP addresses associated with the temporary account name
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ips: List of IP addresses used by the temporary account
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ip-item: IP address in IPv4 or IPv6 format
checkuser-rest-property-desc-auto-reveal: Whether auto-reveal of temporary accounts is enabled for the performer
checkuser-rest-param-desc-limit-temp-acc: Maximum number of temporary accounts to return
checkuser-rest-response-desc-temp-accoun: Response containing temporary accounts that have edited from the given IP address
checkuser-rest-param-desc-batch-users: Map of temporary usernames to their requested revision/log/abuse filter IDs
checkuser-rest-request-desc-batch: Request body containing a map of temporary usernames to their requested revision/log/abuse filter IDs
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-use: Map of temporary usernames to their parameters
Parameters to retrieve IPs of a specific temporary user
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-rev: List of revision IDs to look up
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-log: List of log IDs to look up
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-abu: List of AbuseFilter log IDs to look up
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-las: Whether to include the last used IP in the response
checkuser-rest-response-desc-batch: Response containing IP addresses mapped to target temporary accounts and requested IDs
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ip-data: IP data associated with a temporary account
checkuser-rest-property-desc-rev-ips: Map of revision IDs to IP addresses, or null when no revision IDs were requested. The map omits expired IDs.
checkuser-rest-property-desc-log-ips: Map of log IDs to IP addresses, or null when no log IDs were requested. The map omits expired IDs.
checkuser-rest-property-desc-abuse-log-i: Map of AbuseFilter log IDs to IP addresses, or null when no AbuseFilter log IDs were requested. The map omits expired IDs.
checkuser-rest-property-desc-last-used-i: Last used IP address for the user, if requested
checkuser-rest-response-desc-connected-t: Response containing temporary accounts that have edited from the same IPs as the target temporary account
checkuser-rest-property-desc-connected-a: List of connected temporary account names
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ips-used-co: Number of IP addresses used by the target temporary account
checkuser-rest-request-desc-update-case: Request body to update the status of a suggested investigation case
checkuser-rest-response-desc-update-case: Response containing details of the updated suggested investigation case
checkuser-rest-property-desc-case-reason: Reason for updating the case status
checkuser-rest-property-desc-formatted-r: Formatted reason status message for display
checkuser-rest-param-desc-case-status-in: New status to apply to the case (open, resolved, or invalid)
checkuser-rest-param-desc-case-reason-in: Reason for updating the case status
checkuser-rest-param-desc-case-id-input: Unique identifier of the suggested investigation case
checkuser-rest-param-desc-clienthints-ty: Type of event to log, namely revision or privatelog
checkuser-rest-param-desc-clienthints-id: Unique identifier of the revision or private log event
checkuser-rest-param-desc-clienthints-fu: Detailed full version list of user agent brands
checkuser-rest-param-desc-clienthints-ua: Deprecated full user agent version string
checkuser-rest-request-desc-clienthints: Request body containing client hints data
checkuser-rest-response-desc-clienthints: Response indicating successful storage of client hints
checkuser-rest-property-desc-clienthints: Message explaining that the client hints were stored successfully
checkuser-rest-request-desc-csrf: Request body containing the CSRF token.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-update-c: Update suggested investigation case status and reason
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-update-case: Updates the status and reason of a suggested investigation case.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-userinfo: Returns information about public and restricted user activity.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-userinfo-bl: Returns local and global block and lock status of a user.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-temp-acc: Get IP addresses for temporary account
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-temp-accoun: Returns IP addresses associated with a temporary account name.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-temp-acc: Get temporary accounts for IP address
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-temp-accoun: Returns temporary accounts that have edited from a given IP address.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-batch-te: Get IP addresses for temporary account batch
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-batch-temp-: Returns IP addresses mapped to a list of temporary user names, and log/abuse log IDs.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-connected-t: Returns other temporary accounts that have edited from the same IPs as a given temporary account.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-clienthints: Creates user agent client hints data for a given revision or log event.
